creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
From a full rebuild spurred by a -CURRENT __FreeBSD_version, didn't realise that since 69.3.0 name normalisation [0] is enforced on the resulting bdist wheels. There will need to be an audit on consumer PORTNAMEs to ensure name normalisation is followed, ie Mako -> mako.

[0] https://packaging.python.org/en/latest/specifications/source-distribution-format/#source-distribution-file-name
